description:
Sets one of entity [[Eden Editor: Entity Attributes|attributes]]. For the list of all attributes with their properties see [[Eden_Editor:_Setting_Attributes#Attributes|Setting Attributes]].
{{Feature|important|Attributes are available only within the [[:Category:Eden Editor|Eden Editor]] workspace. You cannot access them in scenario preview or exported scenario!}}
examples: <sqf>player set3DENAttribute ["allowDamage", false]; // Mark player as invincible</sqf>
name: set3DENAttribute
